title: Import CSV in MsSqL for mRemoteNG
author: yilmazc
body_snippet:
HI,

I would like to import a csv file into a ms sql database so that mremoteng can reuperate all my connections in this database.
i have before export all my vms servers from vcenter to csv, like this : 
Name | Hostname | Description | Protocol |  vcenter        |   IP  Address      |  Mac address
vm1      vm1             desc vm1      RDP        vcenter01       192.168.0.xxx       adr mac
vm2      vm2             desc vm2      SSH2      vcenter01        192.168.3.xxx       adr mac
vm3  ...

iterations.description: Issue title mentions importing CSV into MS SQL storage but the body is empty — unclear whether this is a feature request for CSV import support or a bug with existing CSV/SQL import functionality, and no steps to reproduce or expected behavior are provided.

comments.author: yilmazc
comments.snippet: Or How can i import directly my csv in mremoteNG (confcons.xml)  ?

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.
